form.div:
I agree to the
Terms & Conditions

span.class: d-block fa fa-4x fa-thumbs-up mx-auto rounded-circle bg-primary

h5.span:
Your Insurance Quotation Request
has been successfully submitted.

input.name: quote_number
input.placeholder: Type Your Website Reference Number, Example: xZRJ8YL6Po

p.class: h5 text-primary border-bottom border-2 pb-2 pt-2

a.t-attf-class: dropdown-item {{'active' if not request.params or ('filter_by' in request.params and request.params.get('filter_by') == 'all') else ''}}
dropdown-item {{'active' if 'filter_by' in request.params and request.params.get('filter_by') == 'state_draft' else ''}}
dropdown-item {{'active' if 'filter_by' in request.params and request.params.get('filter_by') == 'state_confirmed' else ''}}
dropdown-item {{'active' if 'filter_by' in request.params and request.params.get('filter_by') == 'state_running' else ''}}
dropdown-item {{'active' if 'filter_by' in request.params and request.params.get('filter_by') == 'state_expired' else ''}}
dropdown-item {{'active' if 'filter_by' in request.params and request.params.get('filter_by') == 'state_cancel' else ''}}

input.name: search
input.placeholder: Search by insurance number, category, status...

a.t-attf-class: dropdown-item {{'active' if not request.params or 'filter_by' not in request.params or request.params.get('filter_by') == 'all' else ''}}

input.name: search
input.placeholder: Search by claim number and status...

a.t-attf-class: dropdown-item {{'active' if not request.params or (request.params.get('filter_by') == 'all') else ''}}

div.strong: There are currently no insurances for your account.

div.class: alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show text-center

div.div: Your insurance renewal request is being processed.

t.t-if: policy.policy_holder_street or policy.policy_holder_street2 or policy.policy_holder_city or policy.policy_holder_zip or policy.policy_holder_state_id or policy.policy_holder_country_id

p.class: h5 text-primary border-bottom border-2 pb-2 mt-2
h5 text-primary border-bottom border-2 pb-2 pt-2

div.p: Your claim has been submitted successfully!
Your insurance renewal request has been submitted successfully.

div.strong: There are currently no claims for this insurance.

p.class: h5 text-primary border-bottom border-2 pb-2 pt-2
h5 text-primary border-bottom border-2 pb-2 pt-2
h5 text-primary border-bottom border-2 pb-2 pt-2

t.t-if: claim_rec.policy_holder_street or claim_rec.policy_holder_street2 or claim_rec.policy_holder_city or claim_rec.policy_holder_zip or claim_rec.policy_holder_state_id or claim_rec.policy_holder_country_id

p.class: h5 text-primary border-bottom border-2 pb-2 pt-2

div.strong: There are currently no 'Managing Insurance' entries linked to your account.
